name: Iso11783IL_FSCloseFile
title: Iso11783IL_FSCloseFile
description: This function closes an opened file or directory.

parameters.name: fileHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the file or directory, which was opened with Iso11783IL_FSOpenFile
